race.comment: MARCHON (5) has not appeared since making a little late ground to finish fifth on debut over 1100m at Rosehill in July. In the market that day so a better run was expected. Trialled well recently and over more ground this time looks a big chance to break the ice. ABOVE THE LAW (1) drove hard late but missed in a tight one when resuming over today's distance at Hawkesbury last time out. Ran second in a strong form race at Kembla at the same stage last prep. Sure to be about the money. GRAFFITI TYCOON (4) is a well-related first starter for the O'Shea/Charlton camp. Trialling like an above-average type and early markets confirm his potential. MR MILLER (6) is an Almanzor three-year-old on debut for Waller/McDonald. Trial form just fair but he has come up as a $3.00 favourite in early markets. Time will tell if he has ability or the price is a trainer/jockey reaction. MUMBAI MAHARANI (12) bumped into a smart one at the Kenso last start. Should be competitive.
